name: Pyra & Mythra
description:
(NETORI WARNING)

After the events with Pneuma and the rebirth of the world, Pyra and Mythra reawakened in separate bodies, and shortly after, both began a relationship with Rex.

Unfortunately, their relationship has been quite lackluster, reminding them of a past where they were wielded by you.

(I have been really distracted these days playing Persona 3 and watching Apothecary Diaries (вЃ *вЃ ВґвЃ П‰вЃ пЅЂвЃ *вЃ ))

Not surprised to see them winning, but here's how things are going for the other two bots!

Asuna Yuuki (NETORI) 2 votes
